description: Implements the core Rust library, parsers, and auditing logic
responsibilities: Implement YAML parser for GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, CircleCI
Build syntax validator with detailed error messages
Create secrets and environment variable auditor
Implement Docker image auditor with caching

code_patterns.error_handling: Use Result<T, PipecheckError> with thiserror crate
code_patterns.async_runtime: Use tokio for async Docker API calls
code_patterns.testing: Unit tests per module + integration tests with fixture YAML files
